description: Expected plugin context hooks exposed by core to runtime extensions.

setAuthFeaturesProvider.lifecycle: called during plugin setup before auth feature route evaluation
setAuthFeaturesProvider.fallback: if unset, core route returns static defaults

setAutoSyncProviders.lifecycle: called during plugin setup before import/sync provider policy is applied
setAutoSyncProviders.fallback: if unset, core default provider allowlist remains active

notes: This artifact defines expected contract shape regardless of current wiring maturity.
Consumers should feature-detect hook availability before invoking.
